game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **백화점 스토리2**: Players manage and expand a multi-story department store by strategically placing various shop types, such as fossil exhibits, cinemas, or restaurants, across different floors using a tap-and-drag interface. The core loop involves attracting diverse customers, fulfilling their specific requests like "I want ramen" or "I wish there was a bookstore" to increase satisfaction and loyalty, which in turn can attract VIP customers. Progression is driven by earning revenue from shops, expanding the building's footprint and verticality, and unlocking new, larger facilities and transportation links like bus stops or subway stations, which increase customer traffic and allow for specialized themed floors. Players must also consider economic trends and weather conditions to plan strategic sales events and compete against rival department stores, with the ultimate goal of achieving a 5-star rating by maximizing customer satisfaction, profit, and store variety.
game_info.description: Build and manage a thriving multi-story department store! Place different shop types on floors to attract customers. Fulfill customer requests to increase satisfaction and earn revenue. Expand your building vertically, unlock new facilities, and work toward achieving a prestigious 5-star rating. Balance customer needs, manage your budget, and create the ultimate shopping destination.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys (↑/↓): Navigate between floors and menu options
Space: Select/Place shop or confirm action
Shift: Toggle shop selection menu
Z: Remove selected shop (when hovering over a shop)
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (returns to title screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic game functionality including shop placement, customer spawning, and revenue generation. Validates that the core game loop works correctly and customers interact with shops properly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Randomly place shops on available floors, allow customers to spawn and visit shops. Test shop placement mechanics, customer satisfaction updates, and basic revenue flow over several frames.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Game should run without errors, shops should be placed successfully, customers should spawn and interact with shops, and revenue should increase over time. No crashes or state inconsistencies.
TEST_1.description: Tests basic game functionality including shop placement, customer spawning, and revenue generation. Validates that the core game loop works correctly and customers interact with shops properly.

TEST_1.expected: Game should run without errors, shops should be placed successfully, customers should spawn and interact with shops, and revenue should increase over time. No crashes or state inconsistencies.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the optimal path to winning the game by achieving a 5-star rating. Validates that strategic shop placement, customer satisfaction management, and building expansion lead to victory.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Strategically place high-value shops like restaurants and cinemas first to maximize revenue. Expand floors as budget allows. Focus on fulfilling customer requests to boost satisfaction and attract VIP customers. Build toward achieving 5-star rating.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Game should reach GAME_OVER_WIN state when the store achieves 5-star rating. Customer satisfaction should increase consistently, revenue should grow exponentially with proper shop placement, and the final rating should be 5 stars.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests floor expansion and vertical building mechanics. Validates that the player can successfully add new floors and that the UI correctly handles multi-floor navigation and shop placement.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Focus on earning revenue quickly through initial shops, then repeatedly expand floors upward. Test navigation between multiple floors and ensure shop placement works correctly on all floor levels.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The building should expand to multiple floors without errors. Navigation should work smoothly across all floors, and shops should be placeable on any floor. UI should correctly display floor information.
